requirement:
Develop a weather dashboard for a city name

Create a CLI application that accepts a city name as input and displays the current weather conditions including temperature, humidity, wind speed, and a brief weather description. Use the OpenWeatherMap API with this API key: fc0c90dcc50590c3bc1289278e78610a Example usage: py -m src.main "Dallas" — Story 3: CLI Interface Implementation
Convert a Word document to PDF. Take a file path as input and convert it to PDF. No validation, no error handling, keep it simple. — Story 2: CLI Interface
develop simple word to pdf convertor
Fetch the current Bitcoin price from a free API and display it
Convert a Word document to PDF. Take a file path as input and convert it to PDF. No validation, no error handling, keep it simple. — Story 2: Command line interface
show current  stock price based on the ticker symbol — Story 2: CLI Stock Price Display
develop a simple application to get the bitcoin price — Story 2: CLI Bitcoin Price Display

Develop a simple Bitcoin price tracker

Create a CLI application that fetches the current Bitcoin price in USD using the CoinGecko public API (no API key needed) and displays it to the user. — Story 3: CLI interface
weather forecast application enhance to show more user friendly fields on the output if possible web url access — Story 2: Data Formatter Module

as input and displays the current weather conditions
including temperature, humidity, wind speed, and a
brief weather description.
